Software Requirements Specification - Sample Module
====================================================

1. Introduction
   The communication module provides data frame processing capabilities
   for the embedded gateway system.

2. Requirements

   REQ-SW-001: The system shall initialize the communication module
   with a valid configuration structure.
   ASIL: ASIL-B

   REQ-SW-002: The system shall process incoming data frames and store
   them in an internal buffer with a maximum size of 256 bytes.
   ASIL: ASIL-B

   REQ-SW-003: The system shall provide a reset function to restore
   the module to its initial state.
   ASIL: QM

3. Interfaces
   - g_comm_init: Initialize module
   - g_process_frame: Process data frame
   - g_comm_reset: Reset module
